entities.name: CROP MICROBIOME
entities.description: The microbial population surrounding a plant, essential for crop development and sustenance

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING MICROBES
entities.description: Microbes that act as growth enhancers and disease suppressors

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural output of a crop

entities.name: NANOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The application of nanotechnological tools to agricultural systems to boost output

entities.name: NANOPARTICLES
entities.description: Small-scale particles that interact with crop microbiomes and plant systems

entities.name: PLANT SYSTEMS
entities.description: The biological structures and processes of the plant

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING BACTERIAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Bacterial communities that promote plant growth

entities.name: BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The production of nanoparticles utilizing the crop microbiome

entities.name: NANOMATERIALS
entities.description: Materials engineered at the nanoscale that interact with root colonizing microbes

entities.name: ROOT COLONIZING MICROBES
entities.description: Microbes that inhabit the root zone of plants

entities.name: PLANT HEALTH
entities.description: The overall physiological state and vigor of the plant

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that negatively affect plant growth

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Living organisms that negatively affect plant growth

entities.name: RHIZOBACTERIAL METABOLITE CHANGES
entities.description: Alterations in the chemical substances produced by rhizobacteria

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SOILS
entities.description: The soil environment where crops are grown

entities.name: DEFENSE TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the microbiome that protect the plant from pathogens

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The worldwide output of food crops

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant or its microbiome to withstand biotic stress
